creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158206
patch to update dependency

The port devel/p5-Log-Dispatch-File-Stamped uses devel/p5-Test-TempDir as a dependency, but that port expired and it devel/p5-Test-TempDir-Tiny is given as an alternative.

Change the dependency in devel/p5-Log-Dispatch-File-Stamped and bump PORTREVISION to force a rebuild.

While here, since the resulting package contains no architecture-specific files, set NO_ARCH to YES.
